summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. PR #73635 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation classified it as security-sensitive. No close, merge, fix, or label mutations are planned; all unrelated open PRs are classified conservatively against their own hydrated state.
